plugins.name: critique
plugins.description: Adversarial red-teaming — parallel attackers probe any target (code, specs, plans) for vulnerabilities, bugs, fragility, and design problems, with critical/high findings independently verified

plugins.name: anti-sycophancy
plugins.description: Install the Critical Feedback Protocol into CLAUDE.md with enforcement hook

plugins.name: requirements-interviewer
plugins.description: Deterministic-first requirements interviewer — a skeptical analyst clarifies a feature before implementation, while a dependency-free TypeScript CLI validates, persists, and renders the requirements package handed to builder agents
